summary: Iteration 86: Text Readability Fix Verification - All pages tested and text is readable against dark backgrounds. The color mapping fix (#333-#666 → #888-#B0B0B0) has been successfully applied across all major pages.
critical_code_review_comments: AgentConfig.jsx: All text colors properly updated - tab labels (#B0B0B0), descriptions (#999), slider labels (#888), toggle descriptions (#999)
Dashboard.jsx: Stats labels (#B0B0B0), conversation items (#B0B0B0), agent types (#B0B0B0) all readable
CRM.jsx: Lead card text (#B0B0B0), company names, phone numbers all readable with placeholder-[#666]
Marketing.jsx: Campaign names, stats, descriptions all readable
TrafficHub.jsx: Specialist names, campaign names, stats all readable
LandingV2.jsx: Hero text, feature descriptions, pricing text all readable
Pricing.jsx: Plan names, prices, feature lists all readable
Placeholder colors correctly set to #666 minimum for visibility

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages verified with readable text

context_for_next_testing_agent: Text readability fix has been verified across all major pages. The dark luxury theme uses gold (#C9A84C), black (#0A0A0A/#111/#1A1A1A), white, and gray. Text colors are now #888-#B0B0B0 for descriptions and #999 for secondary text, ensuring good contrast. Placeholder text uses #666 minimum.
